SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.coff

Class CoffFile

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.coff.CoffFile
public class CoffFile extends Object
Represents a COFF (Common Object File Format) file.

This class provides functionality to parse existing COFF files and build new ones. COFF files contain a header, section table, symbol table, and string table.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    CoffFile.Builder
    Builder for constructing COFF files programmatically.
    static class

    Parser for reading COFF files from an input stream.
